text: I feel as if I am transitioning from an exterior world—clean, modern, functional—to an interior space that is curated and intellectual. The corridor is quiet, almost sterile, evoking a sense of anticipation, while the exhibit draws me into a world of ideas and inquiry. I'm curious and engaged, struck by the purposefulness of the R+D space. It makes me wonder about the nature of innovation and my own place in this evolving environment where creativity and technology collide.
